issues.sample: WAS DRIVING ON CITY STREET WITH FAIRLY HIGH TRAFFIC.  VERY HEAVY RAIN AND HUMIDITY.  I TURNED ON DEFOGGER AND THE WINDSHIELD GOT INCREASINGLY MORE FOGGED UP.  THE DEFOGGER DID NOT CLEAR THE WINDSHIELD.  I HAD TO DRIVE AT 20 MPG TO AVOID A COLLISION.  I BROUGHT THE CAR TO THE DEAL

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2017 SUBARU CROSSTREK. INTERMITTENTLY, THE CONTACT WAS UNABLE TO REMOVE THE KEY FROM THE IGNITION WHILE THE IGNITION WAS IN THE OFF POSITION AND THE GEAR SHIFT SELECTOR WAS IN PARK. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN TO PALM SPRINGS SUBARU (LOCATED AT 67925 E PALM CANYO

THE WINDSHIELD ON MY 2017 CROSSTREK CHIPS TOO EASY. I HAVE NEVER HAD CHIPS ON ANY OTHER VEHICLES WINDSHIELD. THE GLASS MUST BE TOO SOFT. THIS HAS HAPPENED TO MY CROSSTREK A FEW TIMES WHILE IN MOTION.     MY TRANSMISSION FEELS LIKE IT SOMETIMES SLIPS, AND SHUDDERS WHILE THE VEHICL

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2017 SUBARU CROSSTREK. WHILE OPERATING THE VEHICLE AND APPROACHING A STOP, THE VEHICLE STALLED WITHOUT WARNING. THE VEHICLE WAS ABLE TO RESTART, BUT THE FAILURE RECURRED THREE TIMES. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN TO AUTONATION SUBARU SCOTTSDALE (15678 N NORTHSIGHT

VEHICLE IS ONLY 2YRS OLD AND HAS ROUGHLY 6200 MILES ON IT. THE BRAKES WERE MAKING AN AWFUL RUBBING/ GRINDING NOISE AND SMELLING LIKE THEY WERE BURNING. SUBARU DEALER IS OVER AN HOUR AWAY FROM HOME AND DIDN'T FEEL THAT IT WAS SAFE TO DRIVE VEHICLE THERE. TOOK IT TO A LOCAL GARAGE

narrative.headline: What 2017 Subaru Crosstrek owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 97 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Visibility/Wiper (24% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: WAS DRIVING ON CITY STREET WITH FAIRLY HIGH TRAFFIC.  VERY HEAVY RAIN AND HUMIDITY.  I TURNED ON DEFOGGER AND THE WINDSHIELD GOT INCREASINGLY MORE FOGGED UP.  THE DEFOGGER DID NOT CLEAR THE WINDSHIELD.  I HAD TO DRIVE AT 20 MPG TO AVOID A COLLISION.  I BROUGHT THE CAR TO THE DEAL
